blocker_name: Runtime browser target/static asset route mismatch
symptoms: FPS measured on incomplete page context.
likely_causes: B. server serves API but not app route
C. isolated runtime copy missing app static files
D. runner target path does not match server static mount
E. required asset verification is misaligned
affected_evidence: FPS acceptance for full UI baseline
safe_fix_options: Add runtime UI route discovery and route preflight before browser measurement.
Require HTTP 200 for HTML + CSS + JS assets before accepting FPS.
Align runner target path with actual server static mount path.
Block measurement early when route/assets fail and emit route-specific blocker verdict.
forbidden_fix_options: Edit V0.6 app/server source in this interpretation task.
Accept FPS without required CSS/JS load.
Use screenshot-only evidence for runtime performance PASS.
Commit raw traces to bypass route truth.
required_future_checks: Required CSS URL returns HTTP 200 and stylesheet is loaded.
Required JS URL returns HTTP 200 and script is loaded.
API checks remain PASS after route fix.
FPS acceptance only after required assets load.
next_gate_requirements: No runtime source edits unless explicitly scoped.
No fake PASS while required assets fail.
GATE-U12 report budget and raw-trace prohibition stay active.
